## Section 3: Data Boundary Tests

For validation rules that contain numeric or conditional thresholds.

| TC-ID | BR-ID | Scenario | Given | When | Then | Priority |
|-------|-------|---------|-------|------|------|----------|
| TC-BND-001 | BR-004 | At Exact Boundary Value: Date validation — reject dates beyond 21 | Input at boundary for rule BR-004 in XFXCYMD | Boundary input processed: at exact boundary value | System behaves correctly per rule specification at this boundary | P1 |
| TC-BND-002 | BR-004 | One Below Boundary: Date validation — reject dates beyond 21 | Input at boundary for rule BR-004 in XFXCYMD | Boundary input processed: one below boundary | System behaves correctly per rule specification at this boundary | P1 |
| TC-BND-003 | BR-004 | One Above Boundary: Date validation — reject dates beyond 21 | Input at boundary for rule BR-004 in XFXCYMD | Boundary input processed: one above boundary | System behaves correctly per rule specification at this boundary | P1 |
| TC-BND-004 | BR-007 | At Exact Boundary Value: Date validation — day must be 01 or late | Input at boundary for rule BR-007 in XFXCYMD | Boundary input processed: at exact boundary value | System behaves correctly per rule specification at this boundary | P1 |
| TC-BND-005 | BR-007 | One Below Boundary: Date validation — day must be 01 or late | Input at boundary for rule BR-007 in XFXCYMD | Boundary input processed: one below boundary | System behaves correctly per rule specification at this boundary | P1 |
| TC-BND-006 | BR-007 | One Above Boundary: Date validation — day must be 01 or late | Input at boundary for rule BR-007 in XFXCYMD | Boundary input processed: one above boundary | System behaves correctly per rule specification at this boundary | P1 |

|-------|-------------|---------|-------|------|------|
| N/A | N/A | No PHI-tagged rules identified | N/A | N/A | N/A |

## Section 6: Test Execution Priority

| Priority | Run When | Criteria | Test Case IDs |
|----------|---------|----------|--------------|
| **P1** - Mandatory pre-UAT | Before UAT | PHI, CRITICAL, or validation | TC-BR-003-H, TC-BR-003-F, TC-BR-004-H, TC-BR-004-F, TC-BR-005-H, TC-BR-005-F, TC-BR-006-H, TC-BR-006-F, TC-BR-007-H, TC-BR-007-F... |
| **P2** - Pre-go-live | Before production | HIGH complexity, calc, routing | TC-US-US-2026-001-AC01, TC-US-US-2026-001-AC02, TC-US-US-2026-002-AC01, TC-US-US-2026-002-AC02, TC-US-US-2026-003-AC01, TC-US-US-2026-003-AC02, TC-US-US-2026-004-AC01, TC-US-US-2026-004-AC02, TC-US-US-2026-005-AC01, TC-US-US-2026-005-AC02... |
| **P3** - Full regression | Before each sprint | All remaining cases | TC-BR-001-H, TC-BR-001-F, TC-BR-002-H, TC-BR-002-F, TC-BR-008-H, TC-BR-008-F, TC-BR-009-H, TC-BR-009-F, TC-BR-010-H, TC-BR-010-F... |

---

## Notes for Test Execution

1. **AS400 Baseline:** Verify all BR tests against the original AS400 system first.
2. **PHI masking:** Section 4 requires synthetic test data - no real patient data.
3. **Boundary values:** Confirm exact threshold values with Mainframe SME.
4. **Low-confidence rules:** Require SME sign-off before test cases are authoritative.
5. **Missing source:** Test cases for MISSING_SOURCE components require manual design.
